title: stochastic 100% on jssm.ts
manager: Bring stochastic coverage of the core `jssm.ts` runtime to 100% — the main engine file, where an uncovered branch is a genuinely untested execution path a real machine could hit. This is the keystone coverage chore: with it done, the 6.0 suites start from a core the seeded walks have actually driven through every branch, not merely the ones the fixed tests remembered to hit.
